why_this_action.summary: Patched the lane selector so it stops re-choosing directory_confirmation while the live SaaSHub secondary-surface repair is still inside its documented follow-up window.
supporting_reasons: The latest board already said directory secondary-surface repair had shipped in the current review window.
The latest selector still picked directory_confirmation anyway, which would have created duplicate fake progress.
The live correction log documents a review_window of 2026-05-31, so the selector needed to honor that hold directly.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
backlink_status_latest.json: SaaSHub live listing + secondary surfaces remain active evidence
marketing_execution_board_latest.md: directory secondary-surface repair already shipped in the current review window

result.summary: Repaired duplicate directory follow-up selection, then regenerated the latest lane artifacts so the loop no longer points at an already-active review-window action.

verification.guard_reason: The live secondary-surface repair already has an active review window until 2026-05-31T00:00:00, so selecting directory confirmation again before then would be fake progress.
